{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603212216575B04924744AF3AF29F89\"}"},"total":212},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7614095157230814014","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"说句实话，我就喜欢这种调调，这种感觉实在是让人看的太爽了！\n令人感到振奋，这种坚定的封建主义战士的调调，但是一旦配上那种坚定的善良主义，就会显得一种特别理所当然的感觉"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772797368,"group_id":"7606531160465755198","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1yjeOGrPCpjXr9hnPE0MISYCAdQgZxiXzdGlEBsd+n5","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/3ec6d532f92f4bf5855188b600775a75~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776621318\u0026x-signature=lYLU4JQHQb5vAcAyFqGdCv%2BYDnE%3D","user_id":"2261020958536532","user_name":"九尾龙狼"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2261020958536532","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_2","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"作家Lv.2\",\"title_id\":\"author_level_2\"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{\"title_text\":\"作家Lv.2\",\"title_default_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"title_dark_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"bg_default_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#FF9F31\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#FFB95C\\\"}\",\"bg_dark_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#CC8029\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#CC9349\\\"}\",\"title_dark_diaphaneity\":\"CC\"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.2"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7606531160465755198","book_info":{"abstract":"（单女主，边缘行者，赛博朋克2077，久经考验的封建主义战士）一个真正的骑士，在赛博朋克的世界里，开历史倒车的故事。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/71855bfbd3691ed4cf26179
